Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T extends Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier, BigDecimalVerifier, ComparableVerifier<T>, ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,T>, FloatingPointVerifier<T>, IntegerVerifier<T>, NumberVerifier<T>, PrimitiveCharacterVerifier, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T>, PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T>, PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T>, SizeVerifier
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractComparableVerifier, AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp, AbstractFloatingPointVerifier, AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, AbstractNumberVerifier, AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp, AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp, BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierImpl, BigDecimalVerifierNoOp, BooleanVerifierNoOp, ComparableVerifierImpl, ComparableVerifierNoOp, DoubleVerifierImpl, FloatingPointVerifierNoOp, FloatVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierImpl, IntegerVerifierNoOp, LongVerifierImpl, NumberVerifierImpl, NumberVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl, PrimitiveCharacterVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl, PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl, PrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp, SizeVerifierImpl, SizeVerifierNoOp
public interface ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,T extends Comparable<? super T>> extends ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Comparable but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a ComparableVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    isBetween(T startInclusive, T endExclusive)
    Ensures that the actual value is within range.
    S
    isBetweenClosed(T startInclusive, T endInclusive)
    Ensures that the actual value is within range.
    S
    isComparableTo(T expected)
    Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
    S
    isComparableTo(T expected, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
    S
    isGreaterThan(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified value.
    S
    isGreaterThan(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified the specified value.
    S
    isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isLessThan(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than the specified value.
    S
    isLessThan(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than the value of the specified value.
    S
    isLessThanOrEqualTo(T value)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isLessThanOrEqualTo(T value, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
    S
    isNotComparableTo(T other)
    Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
    S
    isNotComparableTo(T other, String name)
    Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isGreaterThan

      S isGreaterThan(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - a lower bound
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is less than or equal to value

    • isGreaterThan

      S isGreaterThan(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than the specified the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - a lower bound
      name - the name of the lower bound
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is less than or equal to value. If name is empty.

    • isGreaterThanOrEqualTo

      S isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the minimum value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is less than to value

    • isGreaterThanOrEqualTo

      S isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is greater than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the minimum value
      name - the name of the minimum value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is less than to value. If name is empty.

    • isLessThan

      S isLessThan(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the upper bound
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is greater than or equal to value

    • isLessThan

      S isLessThan(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than the value of the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the upper bound
      name - the name of the upper bound
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is greater than or equal to value. If name is empty.

    • isLessThanOrEqualTo

      S isLessThanOrEqualTo(T value)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the maximum value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is greater than value

    • isLessThanOrEqualTo

      S isLessThanOrEqualTo(T value, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is less than or equal to the specified value.
      Parameters:
      value - the maximum value
      name - the name of the maximum value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if value or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value is greater than value. If name is empty.

    • isComparableTo

      S isComparableTo(T expected)
      Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if expected is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual.compareTo(expected) != 0

    • isComparableTo

      S isComparableTo(T expected, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is comparable to the expected value.
      Parameters:
      expected - the expected value
      name - the name of the expected value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if expected or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual.compareTo(expected) != 0. If name is empty.

    • isNotComparableTo

      S isNotComparableTo(T other)
      Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
      Parameters:
      other - the other value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if other is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual.compareTo(other) == 0

    • isNotComparableTo

      S isNotComparableTo(T other, String name)
      Ensures that the actual value is not comparable to another value.
      Parameters:
      other - the other value
      name - the name of the other value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if other or name are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual.compareTo(other) == 0. If name is empty.

    • isBetween

      S isBetween(T startInclusive, T endExclusive)
      Ensures that the actual value is within range.
      Parameters:
      startInclusive - the lower bound of the range (inclusive)
      endExclusive - the upper bound of the range (exclusive)
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if startInclusive or endExclusive are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if endExclusive is less than startInclusive. If the actual value is not in range.

    • isBetweenClosed

      S isBetweenClosed(T startInclusive, T endInclusive)
      Ensures that the actual value is within range.
      Parameters:
      startInclusive - the lower bound of the range (inclusive)
      endInclusive - the upper bound of the range (inclusive)
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if startInclusive or endInclusive are null
      IllegalArgumentException - if endInclusive is less than startInclusive. If the actual value is not in range.
